finding_results.notes: Removed repeated 'thought of' cognition scaffolding and replaced both beats with embodied triggers (rib pressure, ledger ink texture, debt notice curl, unanswered-call log, browser-clearing action) to keep interiority scene-active without triadic listing.

Diversified the three flagged scene openings so they no longer share a repeated motif cluster: annex entry now emphasizes generator vibration/cicada pressure, jail arrival uses lightning on razor wire plus mud-tracked intake, and medical beat uses intercom static/vent squeal/antiseptic air.

summary: All prose/copyedit packet findings for chapter_16 were resolved with targeted, low-churn edits: cognition-template repetition was replaced by concrete embodied detail, and opening texture across key scene entries was differentiated while preserving continuity, voice, and established tonal rawness.
